description: Stylish and super cool, these semi-formal boots with a  blunt toe from timberland will add an extra bounce to your step. With a high quality two tone leather upper and no laces, they are easy to wear and take off. They will look great with jeans, chinos or even your formal trousers. Easy to look spectacular, classy and wow! UpperLeather upper for added durability and styleBlunt toe design for a more stylish lookElastic gores on either side of the midfoot for a more versatile FitLeather haul loop to hang shoes from a backpackLeather inner lining and footbed for absorbing moisture and keeping the feet dry, offering all-day comfortUpper stitched to the outsole for durabilityOutsoleLightweight rubber outsole with a wooden finishRaised heel for ergonomic comfort and styleshoe careWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shineDo not store in direct sunlight
